title: Anyone able to connect Monday with Missive?
excerpt: We are using Missive for our emails and love it. We also use Monday and love it. But there is no way to integrate the two of them. Has anyone found a way to do this? Thanks!

posts.author: Marian (Marian Zapata)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using Missive for our emails and love it. We also use Monday and love it. But there is no way to integrate the two of them. Has anyone found a way to do this? Thanks!

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Marian ,

I haven’t integrated missive with monday so far but I have checked and I can integrate it for you certainly using Zapier or make.

Feel free to reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com

Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: Marian (Marian Zapata)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! I am still on the free version of Missive and it does not offer that until we upgrade. Once I decide on it, and if I can’t figure it out, I will reach out.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
